rulings.Case Title: TATIANA SANOCHKINA et al VS. MATHEW HUI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 26, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANT RICHARD YUEN'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. GRANTED. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED TO DEMONSTRATE GROUNDS FOR VACATION OF THE AWARD (CCP SECTION 1286.2) OR CORRECTION OF THE AWARD (CCP SECTION 1286.6.) THE ARBITRATOR'S DISCLOSURE WAS SUFFICIENT. THE COURT ADOPTS DEFENDANT'S PROPOSED ORDER CONFIRMING THE ARBITRATION AWARD, EXCEPT THAT THE JUDGMENT MUST BE A DOCUMENT THAT IS SEPARATE FROM THE ORDER CONFIRMING THE AWARD. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: PAYNE & FEARS, LLP VS. KATHLEEN SMITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 26, 2010, line 5. PLAINTIFF PAYNE & FEARS, LLP'S Motion To Change Venue. DENY MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF FILED THIS ACTION IN THE WRONG COURT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION BASED ON CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES IS PREMATURE BECAUSE THERE IS NO ANSWER ON FILE. SEE EASTON V. SUPERIOR COURT, (1970) 12 CAL.APP.3D 243, 245. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MA VS. MARILYN RILLORTA FLORENDO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Ineffective Voluntary Dismissal, For Entry Of Involuntary Dismissal With Prejudice Pursuant To Demurrer, And For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 26, 2010, line 12, DEFENDANT MARILYN FLORENDO'S Motion To Vacate Ineffective Voluntary Dismissal, For Entry Of Involuntary Dismissal With Prejudice Pursuant To Demurrer, And For Attorneys Fees. GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE A TIMELY OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER, AND THE DEFECTIVE NOTICE MADE JUDGMENT IN DEFENDANT'S FAVOR INEVITABLE. SEE FRANKLIN CAPITAL CORPORATION V. WILSON (2007) 148 CAL.APP.4TH 187. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED $6,304.00 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES. =(302/CWW)
